hypothesis: The highest-value next Task 6 experiment is still the v4k tied-rowpack replay: prove one physical token row pack can serve embedding lookup and streamed lm_head top-k before changing RTL or preparing another board-facing package. This invocation rejects starting that implementation because Python and normal repository tooling remain blocked, so any new script would be non-executable and would not improve evidence.

commands.cmd: sed read AUTONIGHT_STATUS and required evidence artifacts

primary artifact included source tail and run copy was not created

commands.cmd: line-addressed sed write h2-v4k-rowpack-replay-tooling-gate.json and run copy

decision.rationale: The rowpack replay must inspect weights and traces and compute top1 top5 RMSE across deterministic samples. With Python unavailable and the target script absent, creating an unvalidated script or launching synthesis would add noise rather than evidence.
decision.next_gate: Recover Python apply_patch git or move to an environment where they work, then implement scripts/task6/check_v4k_tied_vocab_rowpack_topk.py and emit a regenerated PASS or PARTIAL artifact with top1 top5 match rates, RMSE distributions, row payload hashes, and compact-versus-banked BRAM accounting.

hardware_execution.reason: no board access in this run
